# Multi Objective Optimization

**Summary**: An optimization approach that seeks to optimize multiple conflicting objectives simultaneously.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] used NSGA II for multi-objective joint optimization of DCR and SR data.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] Essential for joint inversion where different datasets may have conflicting requirements.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] Implemented via the NSGA II algorithm.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The MOO approach (NSGA II) was used to find optimal solutions that do not dominate each other in the joint inversion process. ([[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023, p. 64]])
